  1. recoder.java.declaration
  2. TypeDeclaration

Uses of Class
recoder.java.declaration.TypeDeclaration

Packages that use TypeDeclaration
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.expression.operator
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.pattern
This package contains classes that model design patterns; it is far from being stable and will be subject to changes.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    This class is used to describe an enum type by its equivalent class declaration.

    creates an implicit method called 'prepare', that sets all attributes to their default values

    RecoderModelTransformer.makeExplicit(TypeDeclaration td)
    The method is called for each type declaration of the compilation unit and initiates the syntactical transformation.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static TypeDeclaration
    MiscKit.getParentTypeDeclaration(ProgramElement pe)
    Query returning the type declaration the given program element is contained within.
    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type TypeDeclaration
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(MemberDeclaration child, TypeDeclaration parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(TypeDeclaration child, CompilationUnit parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    static Problem
    MethodKit.checkMethodDeclaration(NameInfo ni, SourceInfo si, TypeDeclaration context, MethodDeclaration candidate)
    Query that finds out problems before inserting a new method declaration.
    static DocComment
    CommentKit.createDoc(TypeDeclaration type, boolean dummy)
    Factory method creating an empty or faked comment conforming to JavaDoc conventions for the given type declaration.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(MemberDeclaration child, TypeDeclaration parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(TypeDeclaration child, CompilationUnit parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getRedundantSuperInterfaces(SourceInfo si, TypeDeclaration td)
    Query that returns all redundant super interfaces of the specified type declaration.
    static boolean
    TypeKit.rename(ChangeHistory ch, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, NameInfo ni, TypeDeclaration type, String newName)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by recoder.kit.transformation.RenameType

    Constructor

    Factory(ClassDeclaration factoryClass, List<TypeDeclaration> products)

  • Uses of TypeDeclaration in recoder.kit.transformation

    Constructors in recoder.kit.transformation with parameters of type TypeDeclaration
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AppendMember(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, boolean isVisible, MemberDeclaration child, TypeDeclaration parent)
    Deprecated.
    Creates a new transformation object that adds the given MemberDeclaration to the list in the given TypeDeclaration at a convenient position.
     
    RenameType(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, TypeDeclaration type, String newName)
    Creates a new transformation object that renames a type declaration and all known references to that type.
